final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the Three Kingdoms Battle of Red Cliffs story (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be single large knowledge card format with clear title at top, bullet points listed beside main illustration
Subject: must include the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) story as the central narrative
Scene/backdrop: must depict the battle scene with boats, fire, and river setting in cartoon story style
Lighting/mood: needs an engaging, educational atmosphere suitable for children — exact tone is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, child-friendly direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a knowledge card paper texture — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the main title; must include key story points with punctuation listed beside the illustration
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be single card format; must clearly present story points with proper punctuation
Avoid: must avoid overly violent or dark imagery unsuitable for children
